hero.badge: Ski-in/ski-out hotels across the Alps and Pyrenees
hero.title: The best snow hotels, where the lift starts at your door
hero.subtitle: 41 hand-picked resorts in France, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, Spain and Andorra. Real altitudes, real ski-in/ski-out, best price across Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com.

destinations.title: All destinations
destinations.subtitle: Filter by country, altitude or vibe. Every link price-checks Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com for you.

destination.whereToStaySubtitle: A handful of well-rated hotels in and around the resort. Pick one, then compare live prices across Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com.
destination.ratingsNote: Ratings from Google. Availability and prices via our booking partners.
destination.resortWebsiteHint: Trail map, opening dates and online lift passes.
destination.liftPassHint: Where to buy your pass once you arrive.
destination.skiRentalHint: Rental shops in and around the resort.
destination.mapSubtitle: Hotels and apartments around the lifts. Compare prices on Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com.
destination.faq1A: {name} offers {pistesKm} km of pistes across {lifts} lifts, from {altitudeBase} m to {altitudeSummit} m. Whether it suits beginners depends on the dedicated learner zones at the base of the slopes, so check the local ski-school options for green and blue run access.
destination.faq2Q: When is the best time to ski {name}?
destination.faq2A: The season runs from {seasonStart} to {seasonEnd}, with a snow score of {snowScore}/100. The best conditions are usually from late January through February, while spring skiing in March and April brings longer days and softer afternoons.
destination.faq3Q: Where should I stay for true ski-in/ski-out?

footer.tagline: The best snow hotels, where the lift starts at your door.
footer.disclosureText: This site contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission when you book through us, at no extra cost to you. It keeps BestSnowHotels free.

home.topSubtitle: The biggest, snowiest, most ski-in/ski-out resorts in Europe, picked by altitude, snow record and bookable inventory.
home.howStep1Text: Each page lists real altitudes, piste kilometres and a transparent ski-in/ski-out note, with no guesswork.
home.howStep2Title: See live hotels on the map
home.howStep2Text: Stay22 maps show hotels and apartments around the lifts in real time, with live prices from the major operators.
home.howStep3Text: Every link price-checks Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com. We earn a small commission, never from your wallet.
home.trustText: Booking.com cannot tell you whether a hotel is really ski-in/ski-out. Resort websites do not compare prices. BestSnowHotels does both, and only that.
